last_prompt: Based on the research documented in docs/research-notes.md, create a prioritized roadmap of new features and improvements for wreck-it. Focus on features that would make wreck-it a breakthrough tool: dynamic task generation by agents, inter-agent communication, intelligent task routing based on agent specialization, and self-improving loop strategies.
